query:
SELECT a.id, a.titulo, a.status, p.colaboradorId, u.name as colaborador_nome
FROM actions a
LEFT JOIN pdis p ON a.pdiId = p.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id
WHERE u.id IS NULL OR u.status = 'inativo';
